svg.title: OSD-244 assay conditions and comparisons
svg.desc: Three experimental categories (Space Flight, Ground Control, Basal Control) each containing two sub-groups, with arrows labeled by the number of pairwise RNA-Seq assays comparing them.
svg.text: OSD-244 · Rodent Research-6 · Thymus RNA-Seq · 30 assays
Each assay is a directed comparison (factor_space_1 vs factor_space_2)
All 30 assays: thymus tissue · Illumina NovaSeq 6000 · transcription profiling
